summary: ANDROID 🟥 FALCON 🎧 "Falcon" code name on onboarding screens
scenario: Onboarding screens display device code name "Falcon" instead of the proper product name when pairing a Falcon device and navigating to Device Settings > Onboarding.
description_clean: On onboarding screens, the device code name "Falcon" is displayed instead of the proper product name. This occurs when pairing a Falcon device and navigating to Device Settings > Onboarding. Expected behavior is that the proper name is shown.
steps: Observe the displayed device name on the onboarding screens
expected: The proper product name is displayed on the onboarding screens.
actual: The device code name "Falcon" is displayed instead of the proper product name.
